name: reasoning
description: Prefrontal Cortex analogue — performs logical inference, causal reasoning, planning under uncertainty, and conflict resolution. Implements deductive, inductive, and abductive reasoning pipelines, forward simulation for planning, and competing-hypothesis resolution. Analogous to the dorsolateral PFC (abstract reasoning, planning, cognitive flexibility), the anterior cingulate cortex (conflict detection, error monitoring), and the orbitofrontal cortex (value computation under uncertainty).
